creator: mrbond@jestocost.cosc.morrisville.edu
text:
when '/var/run/nologin' exists the sshd is not allowing logins from
 people that are in a login class that has the 'ignorenologin' setting on.

Fix: 

you can work around by adding the line 'UseLogin yes' to the sshd_config
How-To-Repeat: 
  put yourself into a login class with this setting and create /var/run/nologin
  and have fun trying to log in ;)
